title: Geodorum terrestre
intro: Geodorum terrestre, commonly known as the terrestrial Geodorum, is a species of orchid native to Southeast Asia. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine to treat various health conditions, including fever, inflammation, and digestive issues, due to its potential health benefits in reducing fever, alleviating pain, and promoting digestion. The bioactive constituents of Geodorum terrestre include alkaloids, such as geodone and geodorumine, which have been found to possess anti-inflammatory and antipyretic properties. Geodorum terrestre is often used to make herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and extracts, which are commonly used to treat fever, headache, and other related health conditions.
